title: Mystère à Shanghai
writer: Maurice Griffe, Stanislas-André Steeman, Jacques de Casembroot
actors: Hélène Perdrière, Paul Bernard, Maurice Teynac
plot: In Shangai, the "Green Dragon" threatens to kill Herbert Aboody, a rich exporter, unless he pays him 50,000 dollars. One of Aboody's secretaries calls inspector Wens for help. An amazing fact occurs, Wens kills Aboody and then dis...
